programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin steals a statue called the Stone Child from the Metropolitan Art Museum; he and Fujiko make their getaway in a Cessna, but they crash at the Bermuda Triangle. They encounter a ghost ship at this grave of many ships and planes.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: A decade removed from his days as a superstar pitcher in the mid-'80s, Dwight Gooden recaptured his swagger on one unforgettable night in the Bronx.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Throwing a no-hitter at the hitter-friendly ballpark Coors Field seems like an unthinkable task. However, Hideo Nomo DID the unthinkable when he took the mound on September 17, 1996 and held the Rockies hitless to make history with the Dodgers.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/05/19 - Roberto Alomar put together a clutch performance for the Orioles in a series-clinching win against the Indians. Alomar tied the game with a two-out single in the 9th, then hit the go-ahead home run in the 12th to send Baltimore to the ALCS.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/23/1996 - The Yankees found themselves in a 6-0 hole against the Braves in Game 4 of the 1996 World Series. After a 3 run 6th inning, Jim Leyritz hit a three-run homer to tie the game in the 8th. New York would score two runs in the 10th for the win.

programme.title: MST3K: Hercules
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots have a casual day on the SOL and endure another incoherent Hercules movie (Hercules (1958)).

programme.title: MST3K: High School Big Shot
programme.desc: The crew fights lapsing into a depression while watching the incredibly dour High School Big Shot in which a high school loser takes part in a heist

programme.title: MST3K: Hobgoblins
programme.desc: Mike and the Bots suffer through the 1988 B movie "Hobgoblins," the story of tiny goblin-like creatures who attack a group of teenagers.

programme.title: MST3K: I Accuse My Parents
programme.desc: A young man gets mixed up with a crime syndicate and blames his inattentive parents. The 1940s-era documentary short explains the then-new techniques that enabled farmers to rush produce to market.

programme.title: MST3K: Invasion Of The Neptune Men
programme.desc: Our heroes discover just how boring an alien attack on Tokyo can be when they view an anti-vehicle for Sonny Chiba.

programme.title: MST3K: Invasion U.S.A.
programme.desc: A group of barflies must figure out what to do when the Soviets attack the U.S. in Invasion USA (1952)

programme.title: Laserblast
programme.desc: A teenager discovers a laser weapon left behind by turtle-like aliens. He uses it for petty revenge, but the weapon slowly changes his personality.

programme.title: MST3K: Mad Monster
programme.desc: Things get hairy on the Satellite of Love thanks to the lupine antics of The Mad Monster (1942) and the second chapter of Radar Men from the Moon (1952).

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.desc: Audrina tells Heidi about Spencer's cheating ways, but Heidi is doubtful - until she sees it for herself. Lauren continues to wonder whether she is ready for a relationship.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Heidi takes a break from Spencer but finds herself missing him more than she'd like. Lauren has to plan a Teen Vogue dinner but takes a backseat to super-intern Emily from New York.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: When Lauren tells Heidi what she really thinks about Spencer, Heidi must choose between her best friend and her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Lauren realizes she can't trust her best friends after Heidi hooks Jen up with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills
programme.desc: Audrina takes Lauren out on a blind double date, while Lauren and Heidi grow farther apart.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Una dinámica los obliga a decirse las cosas de frente. Michelle y Kelly arreglan sus diferencias en la Sala Tornado. Salen por grupos a disfrutar de Colombia. Festejan el cumpleaños de Diana.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP

programme.desc: After splish-splashing their way to the pool and tossing tubes to each other, three teams try to solve a very tricky tiki puzzle before running to the beach to put on some extra special Hula outfits.

programme.desc: Tony explores Sri Lankan cuisine and visits a culinary school.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony decides to relocate for a year to write the great Vietnamese novel.

programme.desc: Tony explores the diverse cuisine and gorgeous landscapes of Chile.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony discovers the melting pot of cultures and cuisines in Melbourne.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels to the heart and soul of America's rust belt.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony visits San Francisco, a city of districts with quirks and flavors.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony hits the streets of Bangkok and immerses himself in all things Thai.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony answers the top 10 viewer questions from an online poll.

programme.desc: Tony visits his wife's homeland and learns what it means to be Sardinian.

programme.desc: Tony tours the alluring French gastronomic region of Brittany.

programme.desc: Anthony visits with food-obsessed individuals.

programme.desc: Anthony tests the culinary landscape of Prague.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony gets to know the food, drink and people of the Hudson River Valley.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Darryl has been cheating on his girlfriend Nicole with her hair dresser Nickell. He says he was just getting bored of the same old thing. Then Cheree is here because her girlfriend Chocolate is having a hard time coming out to her family.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lianna and Devone have been married for a year, but she suspects Devone of being unfaithful because he stays out all night and is rarely home. Then, Kya is out on a $50,000 bond for allegedly abusing her newborn son, but did she do it?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?
programme.desc: Are Tracy and Latonia's men leading secret double lives with other men? What will the lie detector test results reveal about Kanecha and Mike?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sabrionna found many photos, videos, and messages from other women on her husband Anthony's phone. He claims she cheated with his best friend! Then, pregnant Andrea suspects Tim has been unfaithful because she found another woman's purse in his car!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Tonya and Tamon hooked up and dated after she said she was pregnant. She said she miscarried after a fight. Her friend says she never mentioned the pregnancy. Then, a woman says her boyfriend is abusive, but are they even dating?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to live with them just because she’s the mother of his child.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jatavious is back to figure out if he fathered his girlfriend's two kids! Then, Freddie suspects that his girlfriend Amanda skipped work to cheat on him, and he does not think that their new twins are his! Don't miss these wild DNA results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Jackie’s family doesn't trust her boyfriend around her children, but she insists on staying with him. What horrible truth will Shaqualla's lie detector test reveal about her man?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tu'Shaun cheat on Nette with her sisters? Sister Bobbie has a shocking confession that could threaten both Nette's relationship with her man and both of her sisters! Then, triplet Alisha fears that her husband is sleeping with her 2 sisters!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Cheaters, cheaters and more cheaters! Today’s MAURY is full of drama, shock and temptation. These guests simply can’t keep their hands to themselves when faced with a tempting situation and find themselves in deep trouble with their partners!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shenik and Shenequa were united on Maury’s show last year after a DNA test. But now is Shenik sleeping with her sister’s man? Plus, the only thing that stands in the way of these couples tying the knot are their lie detector test results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Ivette says she feels like a prisoner in her own home because her boyfriend controls every aspect of her life. Then, Denise claims Kevin spits on her and punches her in the face, but Kevin says that's not the full truth.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, Get Him Out!
programme.desc: Kelly’s ex-husband Nikki continues to haunt her. He went to jail for killing her 2 week old son and is now dating her 18 year old daughter! Can Steve get Nikki out of their lives forever?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Stephanie says that ever since she came home from work to find her 1-year-old with a black eye, she has feared that her children's babysitter harms them. Sitter Cheryl denies some serious accusations about a child.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: "Psychic Lover" is a phony psychic who convinces women that their boyfriends are cheating so that he can then start having affairs with them. Later Marcus cheated on his girlfriend, Latoria, with her mother!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Russell quiere volver a reunir a su familia luego de que sus 3 hijos murieron en un incendio. Después, Tatiana cree que su sobrino de 2 años sufrió abusos. Además, acusa al ex-prometido de su hermana, Chris. Chris dice que no es un abusador.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desmond cree que su ex, Cassandra, está inventando todo un cuento de que él ha tocado a su hijo porque está celosa de su nueva prometida. Después, Tammy ha sido investigada por abuso infantil e incluso acusada de encerrar a sus hijos en un armario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Megan quería saber si su novio Devin era infiel. ¡Pero salieron a la luz secretos de relaciones aún peores! Además, te sorprenderá saber por qué Laura y Steven necesitan que Steve los ayude otra vez.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dio a luz a un niño y cree que Brandon es el padre. Pero Brandon afirma que no supo del niño hasta tres años después y niega ser el padre. Stephanie y su mamá quieren que Brandon se haga cargo.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Deshawn afirma que su ex Lynette abandonó a su hijo de 5 años. Pero ella afirma que él la está alejando de su hijo. Sin embargo, Deshawn se enteró recientemente de que no está en el certificado de nacimiento de su hijo, ¡así que quiere una prueba de ADN!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Thornton dice que no puede confiar en su novia infiel Crystal y quiere que se someta al detector de mentiras. Además, Stephanie quiere demostrarle a su marido, Mathew, que no está teniendo sexo con un miembro de su familia.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dice que desde que llegó a casa del trabajo y encontró a su hijo de un año con un ojo morado, ha temido que la niñera de sus hijos los lastime. La niñera Cheryl niega las graves acusaciones acerca del niño.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La relación de dos años de Anastasia y Robert terminó cuando él escuchó rumores de que ella le era infiel. Ella dice que siempre le ha sido fiel, pero Robert no le cree y ahora duda que sea el padre de su bebé recién nacido.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Aeshia ha venido a demostrar a Terrence y a su esposa Lashondra que Terrence es el padre de su hijo, pero Lashondra sabe que se equivoca. Tanto Shaunah como Chris se han convencido de que les son infieles. ¿Quién es el padre?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¡Kristy quiere que su madre, Donna, le devuelva su bebé! Donna afirma que se llevó al bebé porque nació con graves discapacidades debido a que Kristy consumió drogas durante el embarazo. ¿Quién está mintiendo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sherry fue atacada a los 15 años y se escapó de su casa. Quiere que Steve la ayude a reunirse con su madre. Después, la hija adolescente de Dawn, Cathy, dio a luz recientemente, pero vive asustada por el desempleado e inestable padre del bebé, Nick.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Steve está celebrando otra reunión de chicas adolescentes para tratar los problemas más importantes a los que se pueden enfrentar todas las adolescentes, incluyendo el uso de drogas, el abuso físico y los agresores en Internet.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Marlo tocó a su hija con Sandra cuando ella tenía 7 años? Ha evitado confrontarla durante casi 10 años, pero hoy, Sandra no se irá hasta que no se sepa la verdad y se haga justicia por su hija.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy le dice a Lissette que Luciano está arruinado, mientras que Margot y Morgana se enteran de la terrible noticia. Luciano le pide a Jeremías que siga el juego de que está en la ruina.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Panchita riñe a Verdoso por haberle gritado a Eduardo que asesinó a Anselmo y trata de hacerlo callar pero el loro la acusa de haber sido ella quien se lo contó. Caridad se entera de todo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Mairita corre a buscar a su hermana para contarle que Teobaldito está muy asustado porque su madre está en la casa y él teme que se lo quiera llevar.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia se cuela en la habitación de Rosaura y toma a Angeliquita en los brazos. Ella comienza a burlarse de la bebé porque su madre nunca sabrá quien es ella. La niña termina llorando y Camelia se marcha.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Fidela siente compasión por Rosaura al ver que tanto sufre por su hija perdida, pero el temor que siente por Sonia la obliga a callar la verdad.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Marfil se encuentra grave en el hospital tras haber ingerido el veneno con el que mataría a Pedro. Jorge le pide a Silvia que se decida en darle una oportunidad. Marfil confiesa todos sus crímenes ante el Comisario.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Gaby le advierte a Maximiliano que no se enfrente a Diego. Max le informa a Emilio sobre la muerte de Marfil y de la denuncia contra Camila. Sharon escapa de la clínica y va a la mansión a buscar a Fedora para vengarse de ella.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Camila es arrestada por su complicidad con Ignacio. Maximiliano entra al quirófano de gravedad tras ser herido por Diego. Larry regresa de Los Angeles y busca a Gaby.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Tras saber que ya no existen obstáculos en su camino con la muerte de Marfil Octavia y Diego y el arresto de Camila e Ignacio, Diana y Maximiliano encuentran por fin su felicidad juntos.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy le dice a Lissette que Luciano está arruinado, mientras que Margot y Morgana se enteran de la terrible noticia. Luciano le pide a Jeremías que siga el juego de que está en la ruina.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Santiago y Willy planifican ir a la policía para rescatar a Verónica. Mariana va en busca de Lissette para desahogarse con ella, de la tristeza que tiene al ver a Ricardo contra ella y su padre.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot advierte a Morgana acerca de Esteban, pero Morgana rechaza el consejo. Teresa le pide a Hilario que consiga un bebé para hacerlo pasar por el hijo que está esperando, pero Hilario se niega.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Verónica y Mariana hablan bajo la vigilancia de Doménica. Aun así puede contarle que está secuestrada y que no puede huir con Santiago. Arturo llega, la lleva a Doménica y la deja en manos de Lucho para que la cuide.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Fidela siente compasión por Rosaura al ver que tanto sufre por su hija perdida, pero el temor que siente por Sonia la obliga a callar la verdad.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats encounter two young girls who are looking for their father, and Luffy has another run in with the devious Captain Foxy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats attempt to destroy a floating resort in order to reunite two sisters who possess a blueprint for making jewels!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook struggles to adjust to life among living after so many years alone in the darkness. Can the Straw Hats survive his chaotic attempts to fit in?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After surviving a terrible storm to reach the entrance to the Red Line, Luffy slugs a mysterious sea monster and Sanji may finally get to meet a mermaid!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats agree to help a mermaid rescue her friend, but the mission gets dangerous when a gang of flying fish dive bomb their boat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats agree to join Camie's rescue mission, but her captured friend turns out to be a dangerous enemy from the past!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats wage a death-defying battle with a group of flying fish, and Luffy is shocked by the familiar face of their latest enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji squares off against his lookalike, Camie shows off just how fast a mermaid can swim, and Luffy defeats a giant bull without even landing a blow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After their showdown with Duval, Luffy and the Straw Hats enjoy a hearty meal before proceeding to the site of their next adventure – an island bursting with bubbles!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stop at an island overflowing with bubbles to get their ship modified for underwater travel, but it's not long before they stumble upon an outrageous explosion and attract unwanted attention.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shakky explains why Sabaody Archipelago seems to be crawling with bounty hunters – eleven of the Grand Line's most wanted pirates are currently ashore and two of them are in Luffy's crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger keeps Zoro from tangling with a powerful Celestial Dragon, and Chopper goes bonkers when Camie disappears from the amusement park.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Camie was abducted by a dastardly gang of kidnappers, and her next stop is the auction house unless the Straw Hats can rescue her. To make it in time, they'll have to hitch a ride on some flying fish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With a little help from their fishy mates, the Straw Hats make it to the auction house in time to save Camie, but explosive elements prevent them from taking her back by force. Luckily, Nami's concocted a very generous plan!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami's plan to save Camie goes belly up when a snot-nosed Celestial Dragon outbids the Straw Hats. Luffy and Zoro make an explosive arrival at the auction house and promptly open up a deadly can of worms.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy turns a mermaid auction into a pirate-style brawl when he knocks the snot out of a Celestial Dragon. With a fleet of marines out to get them, the Straw Hats will have to fight their way off the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: They saved Camie from the auction block, but now the Straw Hats are surrounded by a fleet of marines. Lucky for Luffy, Eustass "Captain" Kidd and Trafalgar Law are ready to join the fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats join forces with Kidd's crew and Trafalgar's mates to make short work of the marines, but they're in for a surprise when they encounter a Warlord of the Sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew duck the marines by hiding out at Rayleigh's house. While Chopper tends to Hachi, Rayleigh entertains the Straw Hats with tales of his days as first mate on Gold Roger's ship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Admiral Kizaru has arrived to lead the marines on a mission to wipe out all pirates. Meanwhile, Luffy and his crew prepare for a deadly battle with one of the Warlords of the Sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A groovy pirate belts out a tune that leaves Kizaru in pieces, but the admiral pulls himself together in time for a crushing Light Speed Kick. Luffy and Sanji try to protect the injured Zoro from a Warlord lookalike.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats narrowly defeat a robot that resembles one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea. But before the dust settles on the field of battle, a far deadlier foe comes looking for a fight.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro's barely breathing, and Admiral Kizaru is ready to stomp him into oblivion. The battered and beaten Straw Hats could certainly use a powerful friend right about now.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One by one, the mighty paw-print of Bartholomew Kuma makes the Straw Hats disappear until only Luffy remains. To where did his mates vanish? And will he ever see them again?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Yesterday, the Straw Hats valiantly battled a Warlord of the Sea. Today, Boss Luffy and his friends at the Pinwheel Diner prepare to compete in the Great Portable Shrine Race!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thriller Company sabotages the race for a sacred treasure, and the displaced Straw Hats must pull an all-nighter to rebuild their shrine and score some ancient gold!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finds himself stranded and starving on a strange island. The rubber-man's amazing appetite puts his manhood in danger when he devours an array of exotic mushrooms!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A mythological space monster tries to eat the Andromeda.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to liberate a fleet of captured ships who aren't sure they want to be liberated. Their AIs fear new captains will enslave them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Genites attack Tyr's wife and colony, and he discovers that he is a father - and his son may be the genetic reincarnation of Drago Mussevni.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: With 50 parties on board, Dylan hosts the signing of the New Commonwealth charter but soon discovers there are intruders intent on stopping the signing.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka and Tyr are taken over by the energy from a dimensional tunnel. Dylan, Trance, and Harper must save them before they destroy the ship.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is framed for murder and must clear his name, all while finding the pieces of a vase said to grant the owner the "blessings of the cosmos."

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Grains of Sand
programme.desc: Johnny (Anthony Michael Hall) faces a difficult decision after saving an infant from a dangerous ring of human traffickers.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Vanguard
programme.desc: Johnny (Anthony Michael Hall) must discover why his reunion with a former student (Danny Masterson), who is now a top biomedical researcher, triggers his visions of Stillson (Sean Patrick Flanery) and a future Armageddon.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Babble On

programme.desc: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed when Froy brings unwanted trouble back to the office? Also, Ronnie and Froy run into an unexpected dilemma when a husband's better halves take the reins.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonia's bad side. When Froy goes missing, Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA.? Down two repo men, the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos, who interrupts a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas, but there's trouble brewing within the crew's ranks. Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy struggle with language barriers when an Italian photographer and his assistant resort to violence because they can't comprehend. Will Sonia finally reveal what's happening, or will carrying her brother's burden get the best of her?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team wonders what's up with Sonia as she wrestles with Lou's big secret. Ronnie goes undercover and takes a gold-digging RO out on a date, but when Carlos lets the cat out of the bag all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou has retired, making Sonia the new boss, but will she be able to keep the company going without her big brother? Matt and Ronnie try to take a car away from a yuppie with an unusual taste for red meat.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars, and the backlash from the team threatens to end her time in charge before it's even begun. Ronnie and Matt attempt to repo from a reckless motocross daredevil.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia, the new boss, is still struggling to keep the team in line, but when tragedy strikes on a routine repossession, her reign at the top faces its biggest challenge yet. Matt and Froy hit the club to take a sports car away from a deadbeat DJ.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Carlos goes undercover at a frat house, but when the party gets the best of him Sonia has to step in and fight the drunken mob. Matt and Ronnie go after some wanna-be internet sensations.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt is eager to work his way onto Sonia's coveted airplane repo, despite her adamancy against him.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo, the team gears up for a mile-high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house, but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party.

programme.title: Tommy Boy
programme.desc: Tommy's earned his diploma and a job at Callahan Auto Parts. However, the family business starts tanking and now Tommy hits the road with his dad's right-hand man, a smug numberscruncher.

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy stars as mild-mannered Norbit, who gets a second chance at love with his childhood sweetheart, Kate. However, obstacles may make this romance slightly more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head Do America
programme.desc: When their TV is Stolen, Beavis and Butt-head hit the road in a hilarious film debut that proves what millions of fans already know: Beavis and Butt-head RULE!

programme.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
programme.desc: Grossing the highest box-office of any British film in the US when released in 1975, this "cult classic" comedy from the Monty Python team loosely follows the legend of King Arthur, along with his squire and his Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Monty Python's Life of Brian
programme.desc: A notorious religious satire, the film tells the story of Brian (Graham Chapman), a reluctant would-be messiah who rises to prominence as a result of a series of absurd and truly hilarious circumstances.

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: Cheech and Chong make their film debut in this riotous rock'n'roll comedy, bringing with them the same madness, lifestyles and sketches that sold over 10 million records in the early 1970s.

programme.title: Trading Places

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve Austin invites eight badasses in the country to battle head to head on his ranch. The last man standing takes on the Skullbuster obstacle course for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Steve welcomes his first eight women to the ranch to compete in head to head competition. They'll face Trench Warfare, the Pulverizer, and the Junkyard to earn the right to take on Steve's Skullbuster and a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: The power of the beards invades the Broken Skull Challenge as eight tough-as-nails male athletes compete in Snatch, Stacked and Chained up for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens perform in musical versions of cult director John Waters' most iconic films. With guest judges Demi Lovato and John Waters.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens are challenged to perform a choreographed routine in a live drag dance spectacular. With guest judges Alyssa Milano (Charmed) and comedian Rachael Harris (The Hangover).

programme.desc: The queens compete in a pageant of Hello Kitty inspired couture. Rebecca Romijn (X-Men) and former Drag Race panelist Santino Rice guest judge.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens find themselves battling for laughs while impersonating their favorite celebrities on "RuPaul's Gaff-In" with Vicki Lawrence's "Mama", who is joined on the judge's panel by actress Busy Phillips.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Maggie goes undercover working in a bar to investigate an anti-government group that regularly gathers there and has several members suspected in a series of bombings.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a Muslim college student and his younger brother are murdered, the team connects with the outraged imam of OA's former mosque, who insists the victims were wrongly targeted as terrorists.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team rushes to investigate an extremist gun group after an anti-gun lobbyist building is bombed, with the promise of others to follow.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team realizes they have a cross-country serial killer on their hands, after another body is found bound with the same knot as their local victim. Also, the case has ties to Isobel's father, Robert, leading to revelations about their relationship.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an ICE agent is fatally shot at an ICE vs. DEA hockey game, the team attempts to find the shooter who they believe may also be targeting Congressman Curtis Grange, who was at the same game.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a mega-heiress is abducted by an extremist group looking to punish her industrialist father, Don and the team rush to find her captors, but their attempt to save her takes a startling turn when they to uncover the group's true motivation.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie works to find an extremely rare comic that was stolen during a deadly robbery at a comic book convention. Wil Wheaton guest stars as Miles Sklar.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team come under pressure when a former FBI subcontractor shoots an agent inside the FBI headquarters and takes one of their own as a hostage, leaving them with a severely restricted plan of action.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie becomes the target of physical intimidation aimed at disrupting his work on the case of a missing investigative journalist.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team work to track down a serial rapist who is using his position as a police officer to lure his victims.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team take down an inner-city meth lab, but it is Don's FBI instinct that leads to the arrest of a bystander who is discovered to have a greater scheme in the works.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don's old flame Robin Brooks returns to California to prosecute an incarcerated criminal, but when three witnesses involved in the case are murdered, Don and his team realize that the next victim may be Robin and must work to keep her safe.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing psychologist whose brother has a criminal past. Plus, Martin's relationship with Kim (recurring guest star VANESSA MARCIL) heats up.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Based on the Robert Graysmith books about the real life notorious Zodiac, a serial killer who terrorized San Francisco with a string of seemingly random murders during the 1960s and 1970s.

programme.title: 88 Minutes
programme.desc: A college professor, who moonlights as a forensic psychiatrist for the FBI, receives a death threat that says he has only 88 minutes to live. To save his life, he must use all his skills and training to narrow down the possible suspects.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: April Fools
programme.desc: DeANNA, a young hottie, seduces MELVIN the class nerd, only to set him up for a cruel April Fools joke. Joined by her co-conspirators, things spiral out of control and Melvin is accidentally killed. Each of the teens make a pact to keep silent.

programme.title: Urban Legend
programme.desc: When New England college student Natalie finds herself at the center of a series of sadistic murders seemingly inspired by urban legends, she resolves to find the truth about Pendleton's own legend. Rated: R

programme.title: Urban Legends: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Amy (Jennifer Morrison), Travis (Matthew Davis) and Graham (Joseph Lawrence) would love to make it big in Hollywood. First, they must survive their last semester at Alpine University, where their thesis films will vie for the prestigious Hitchcock Award.

programme.title: Urban Legends: Bloody Mary
programme.desc: On a prom-night dare, a trio of high-school friends chant an incantation, unleashing an evil spirit from the past with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Deliver Us from Evil (2014)
programme.desc: A NYPD officer (Eric Bana) and unconventional priest Mendoza (Edgar Ramírez) who join forces to investigate a series of disturbing & inexplicable crimes. Together, they must combat the possessions that are terrorizing their city before it's too late.

programme.title: The Final Girls
programme.desc: A young woman grieving the loss of her mother, a famous scream queen from the 1980s, finds herself pulled into the world of her mom's most famous movie. Reunited, the women must fight off the film's maniacal killer.

programme.title: The Craft: Legacy
programme.desc: In Blumhouse's continuation of the cult hit The Craft, an eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

programme.title: 48 Hrs.
programme.desc: Nolte is a rough-edged cop after two vicious cop-killers. He can't do it without the help of smooth Murphy, who is serving time for a half-million dollar robbery.

programme.title: Another 48 Hrs.
programme.desc: Times may change…but these guys don’t! Eddie Murphy and Nick Nolte are back on the streets in this smash sequel.

programme.title: The Prince of Tides
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand and Nick Nolte star in the stunning screen adaptation of Pat Conroy's best-selling novel, THE PRINCE OF TIDES. Nolte is Tom Wingo, a disillusioned Southern coach who must reveal his tortured childhood in order to help his suicidal sister.

programme.title: Blue Chips
programme.desc: Pete Bell, a college basketball coach is under a lot of pressure. His team isn't winning. The stars of the future are being paid by other teams. This practise is forbidden in the college game, but Pete is desperate and has pressures from all around.

programme.title: Another 48 Hrs.

programme.title: Amistad

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive
programme.desc: In June 2003, Blake Stanfield and his aged dad Neil go kayaking in the Alaskan wilderness. Everything goes fine until they run into some ice on the river, and they soon find themselves swept underneath.

programme.desc: A man injured in a medieval roleplaying battle has a sword impaled in his head; a critically ill patient is so afraid of germs he won't allow doctors to treat him; two patients with the same life-threatening symptoms arrive separately from a fashion show.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: We Have A Heartbeat
programme.desc: A carjacker has shot a policewoman in the chest; A homeless woman has cellulitis; A drug dealer is unresponsive after having been beaten. Two middle-aged men with severe burns; A man in his 70s has been found unresponsive in a public place.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: No Time To Think
programme.desc: A circus performer is bitten by a poisonous snake, a baby is delivered in a car park and Dr. Rob gets covered in blood by a man who is HIV-positive.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: When an ex-con's brother joins him in jail, they hatch a plot to escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A man convicted of a double homicide breaks out of prison with creativity.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: 300 feet underground, 9 trapped coal miners search for a way out.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Dawn, 49, was once a model, but today she's homeless and wanders around town using meth and suffering from the effects of Meth Psychosis.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: In this follow-up episode, we look at how two people have fared since their interventions. Ryan, an OxyContin addict, was in and out of treatment for months before dropping out.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Jason, 23, was born into a strict Southern Baptist family. His father, a preacher, and his unstable mother doled out excessive punishments.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Ben, 25, experienced a childhood filled with domestic violence, homelessness, and isolation. He never got to fulfill the potential of his 170 I.Q. and found a new way to find comfort when he was in high school--a drug called DXM.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Tressa's dreams were shattered when a routine drug test revealed that she had been living a double life as an Olympic hopeful and an IV drug user.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A 94-year-old woman dies in the hospital after having a convulsion. The case becomes the business of the medical examiner's office when no one will sign her death certificate.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: An infant and his two-year-old sister are found dead in a house shared by two families. At first, they are believed to have died from either carbon monoxide poisoning or cold medicine overdoses.

programme.title: Stalin vs Hitler: The Russian German War
programme.desc: Darkness descended on Eastern Europe when Hitler and his generals, smug and arrogant, in command of the superlative army which had prostrated France and humbled England, looked eastward, supremely confident that they would now easily destroy Russia.

programme.title: Stalin vs Hitler: The Russian German War
programme.desc: Russia, 1941. The worst winter in 140 years. The tide had turned, and the advantages were now with the Russians. The Germans, in despair, were thrown back, 20 miles, 50, 100, 200 miles. Their generals, in panic, wanted to retreat.

programme.title: Stalin vs Hitler: The Russian German War
programme.desc: The debilitating, humiliating defeat at Stalingrad early in 1943, was the beginning of the end for Nazi Germany. No more stupendous victories, only vicious, blood-spilling defeats. For the final push towards Berlin, Russia assembled an army.

programme.title: Warbirds Over The Trenches
programme.desc: Discover how the aircraft became the eyes of the army and many of the other historic achievements for pilot, engineers and our military during WWI.

programme.title: Warbirds Over The Trenches
programme.desc: Through captivating final interviews with some of the men who flew in the Great War, discover the courage, honor and sacrifices of the first War Birds.

programme.title: Warbirds Over The Trenches
programme.desc: The skies over the western front were extremely competitive. Follow the struggles and advances of the first master of air.

programme.title: Secrets of Nazi U-Boat Bases
programme.desc: Secrets of Nazi U-Boat Bases offers a new look at the Battle of the Atlantic; the most important military campaign of World War II.

programme.title: WWI's First Frontline Cameraman
programme.desc: Geoffrey Herbert Malins is history's first war ‘kinematographer.’ The documentary he shot during WWI's Battle of the Somme drew 20 million viewers.

programme.title: WWII Aircraft: Designed for Victory
programme.desc: Watch as we follow the ingenuity and genius of designers from both side of the Atlantic as they manufacture planes such as the Vought XF5U and the Chance Vought flying Pancake throughout the Second World War.

programme.title: WWII: China's Forgotten War
programme.desc: When Germany began Europe’s WWII by invading Poland in 1939, China had already been fighting Imperial Japan for two years. Lasted from 1937-45 it cost 14 million Chinese lives.

programme.title: D-Day Operation Overlord - The Normandy Invasion
programme.desc: Do you want to learn more about World War II, but don't have time to listen to lengthy audiobooks? Then let The History Journals take you on an hourly history tour of the different facets of the war.

programme.title: D-Day - 80th Anniversary
programme.desc: In 1944, Operation Overlord, liberated France and Western Europe in D-Day. A new documentary explores this pivotal event.

programme.title: Field of Operations: D-Day
programme.desc: The Normandy landings were the landing operations and associated airborne operations on Tuesday, 6 June 1944 of the Allied invasion of Normandy in Operation Overlord during World War II. Codenamed Operation Neptune and referred to as D-Day.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Richard y Ty encabezan la arremetida en el barco, Lazcano quiere una negociación violenta. Cristóbal afronta con valentía su relación y le promete a Marcela no abandonarlos. A Sara puede costarle la vida su deseo de ir a ver a Marisa en la cárcel.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Gabriel besa a Griselda y ella lo echa de su casa con una llave inglesa. Reinaldo le envía un ramo de flores a Griselda como agradecimiento por la ayuda en el restaurante. Antonio y Patricia se cruzan con Amalia y él finge que es una vecina.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: La tía Iris presenció el crimen de Teresa Cristina. Ella discute con Juan Pablo, no quiere que la tía se vaya a vivir a su casa. Griselda descubre que una tal Patricia llama a Antonio al celular y luego ve a su hijo manejando un auto lujoso.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Antonio recoge en el aeropuerto a su madre falsa, Doña Giselle, y la presenta formalmente a la familia de Patricia durante la cena de compromiso. A Teresa Cristina le agrada la madre postiza, pero Griselda descubre todo el engaño montado por su hijo.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Griselda sufre, pero nada la frena a interrumpir la cena y desenmascarar a Antonio ante Patricia, Reinaldo y Teresa Cristina. Él se va furioso y tiene un accidente con el auto de Iván Rouge. Teresa Cristina humilla a Griselda delante de todos.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen

programme.desc: Después de cincuenta años, durante un beso, Juana y Mauricio vuelven a vivir el viaje del día de su boda y todos los momentos felices que los han mantenido juntos. FIN

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Naked Science
programme.desc: Hurricanes are one of the most destructive weather events to strike our planet and have the same power as a nuclear weapon.

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Flight Status

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between our planet and our star. Mercury and Venus make up half of our terrestrial planets, but we still know very little about them. As we take a closer look at our companions, we find more questions than answers.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: Chances are, you are watching this program by satellite, one way or the other. Every day we use these wonders of human design, from communication and weather observation, to GPS and recourse management.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: First Light

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: The commercial space flight companies are edging closer and closer to flight readiness. Paying customers will soon be launching into space; tourist revenue is projected to be a major stepping stone toward space exploration and colonization.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: Cubesats, miniature satellites that have been used exclusively in low Earth orbit for 15 years. Now, these tiny satellites are growing in mainstream popularity, and are being used for interplanetary missions as well. They have even been sent to Mars.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: With approximately 130 active volcanoes, Indonesia is arguably the most active place on earth. Volcanologist Tom Pfeiffer leads an expedition to some of Indonesia most remote and rarely visited volcanos.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: In Indonesia we find regions where the air is so toxic that it's 40 times above human safe levels and sulphuric acid vents from the ground in dense yellowish clouds. Elsewhere, small volcanoes are so active, they are said to erupt every 15 minutes!

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys

programme.desc: Appa's quest to retrieve his drill from Janet leads to an amorous encounter with Umma. Jung gives Kimchee unsolicited advice and plenty of it.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Following Appa's spelling error, Umma becomes the store sign maker. Kimchee's mom visits and Janet lands an internship for Gerald.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Hakeem gets a girlfriend, making both Kim and (surprisingly) Moesha jealous. They conspire to break up the romance, resulting in a heart broken Hakeem.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Moesha and Kim discover some boys at school have a list of the girls with various physical attributes including the “biggest booty” and Moesha is astounded to find her name on the list.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Moesha has her own car, so Frank gives her a credit card for emergencies only. When she goes out with her new boyfriend, Q, he convinces her to let him drive her car.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Moesha has befriended a Latina student, Teresa.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: The twins' first birthday together leaves Tamera's best friend feeling left out, and Ray locked in an argument with Lisa over his parenting methods.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Fearing they'll be separated forever if Ray and Lisa marry other people, Tia and Tamera plot to derail Ray's new romance.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: When Lisa's disapproving mother comes for a visit, Ray agrees to pose as her husband.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: After their parents forbid them to attend a rap concert, the twins sneak out of the house to meet their idol anyway.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria fakes having a disfiguring illness to improve her chances of winning a Daytime Emmy, and Melanie tries to reconnect with her college-age son Will.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: During a dangerous storm, Victoria is unable to fly to the Daytime Emmys, Joy is contacted by the son she put up for adoption, and Melanie blurts out a confession to Pete.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Elka has a familiar jail cellmate, Victoria's assets are frozen, Joy desperately needs Rick's help, and Melanie is irate with Pete for busting her friends.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: As Joy and Rick feign being a genuinely engaged couple, Melanie meets Pete's judgmental mother and is stunned when she finds out who Pete's brother is.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Are 'Best Before' dates on canned food meaningless? Appa is about to find out. Meanwhile, Jung surprises his mom by helping out at church.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: When Janet lands a new job that actually pays, Gerald steps in to fill her shoes at the convenience store.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Mr. Kim fixes a toilet for Kimchee. Janet believes there is more to Edwin and Mrs. Kim's relationship.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Amy and Eggman bond over a tabletop figurine game called Fuzzy Puppies. / Dave the Intern sets out to prove his villainy to his mother, but his attempts all fail… until he inadvertently captures Dr. Eggman.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Tails' workshop is destroyed by a fire, Sonic, Knuckles, and Amy each have conflicting versions of how it happened. / Something is wrong with Tails! It turns out he has a crush on one of the villagers.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: The gang decides to ride out a big storm at Amy's house. / When Sonic, Tails, and Knuckles think Amy and Sticks are being brainwashed by their boy band heartthrob, the guys go undercover to investigate — by forming a boy band of their own.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Because of his robots, Eggman is in trouble with the Home Owners' Association that has jurisdiction over his lair. / Knuckles tries to make amends for a past misdeed, but he only succeeds at making things worse.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: After losing a tooth, Scaredy makes the mistake of trying to trick the Molar Owl. Then, Scaredy discovers that mild-mannered Mildred has a secret.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Momma forces Scaredy and Nestor to team up for the Blasa Bathtub Race. Then, Scaredy loses Nestor's grandmother while taking care of her.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy loses his job to a stacking robot. Then, Scaredy wants to scare someone on Halloweekend.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy ends up in a pickle! Then, Scaredy attempts to film a version of his favorite show.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy protects Balsa from a river monster. Then, Stash N' Hoard competes with “Sort a Fresh” to see who can reach one million customers first.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy gets duped by a slick salesman. Nestor loses his job to his brother Lestor.

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel
programme.desc: Scaredy tries to win a lifetime supply of cleaning supplies. Then, Scaredy discovers Paddy's embarrassing secret and Paddy tries to find one about Scaredy.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After an explosion at his evil lair sends him into a time loop, Eggman relives the same day over and over. / Dr. Eggman markets his brand of tomato sauce.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: To prove that he is an inventor like Tails, Knuckles challenges Tails to participate in the local robot battle./ Dr. Eggman's particle accelerator has been stolen, and all evidence points to Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman is making a movie about his life. He even tries to cast Sonic to play a lame version of Sonic. / Knuckles wants to win the village's annual Chili Dog Cook-Off. He sets out on a quest to find the perfect ingredients.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After a bad experience at Meh Burger, Amy decides to open her restaurant. / A second Knuckles from an alternate dimension becomes stranded in their world and causes trouble for Sonic and his friends.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic realizes he has seven minutes to return Amy's library book and ends up in a race against the clock. / After destroying Amy's couch, Sonic and Knuckles enter a “best friend” game show to win her a new one.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Sonic gets cocky about his survival skills, Sticks and Amy challenge Sonic and Knuckles to the ultimate survival skills contest. / When Knuckles is made mayor for the day, he sends the village spiraling into chaos.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: Jealous of Mouse hero-worshiping Max of Team Pirate, Corto throws doubt on Max'stall tale of vanquishing Kumo, the biggest and scariest Arachno-Titan.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: Team Tiki faces the Cold Kings on the Marsh racecourse, which is crawling with carnivorous plants. With no knowledge of the species, Enki ventures into the jungle in search of a bird who has the secret to surviving the plants.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When Team Tiki is sabotaged in a training run, Team Pirate is suspended from the competition. But Mouse is sure they were falsely accused just because they're Shore Scrubbers and supports their case, much to Corto's chagrin.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When a storm strikes, the Tikis and Team Mirage must spend the night on the Racecourse of Horror. Corto and Mouse start to see ghosts and become convinced that it's actually haunted…

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When the Tikis face the Starfish on the Candyland course, Corto is dazzled by their stardom and ends up offending Oro. A glitch during the race causes the genies to switch places.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When Big Moe discovers his daughter, Mouse, is secretly drone-racing, he heads to Whale Island to bring her home. Mouse must stand up for herself and prove to her dad that her true calling is in the competition.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When a blackout suspends the Whale Cup, Corto worries that she won't win the competition in time to save her island. She and the Tikis try to restore power to White Island by going in search of a crystal in an ancient Aqua base

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: The Tikis must team up with Team Mirage for their next race, and worse: Corto must fly in sync with Hannah or risk losing. Mouse tries to play coach and diplomat, but the two just can't get along.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: Victoria's visiting mother replaces Mina with her as Team Siren's pilot and captain for a special race against the Tikis, following elite maelstrom rules.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: Mouse is desperate to take the Shore Scrubber's challenge, which clashes with Team Tiki's next race. Plus, Corto doesn't think she's experienced enough to take Maroro and Oro on a race that even she deems too dangerous.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When Team Mirage breaks into Whale's office and steals a baby genie called Kami, he escapes and takes refuge with the Tikis. While the Mirages search for it, Corto realizes that having two genies gives Maroro twice the power.

programme.title: Mythic Warriors
programme.desc: After having fought in the Trojan Wars for ten grueling years, the great Ulysses and his men embark on a treacherous journey home.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci and Ryan argue over who has rights to Bentley on his birthday, and Amber breaks down over being separated from Leah. Farrah struggles to spend time with Sophia, and Catelynn and Tyler look for jobs.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber is upset when Gary refuses to celebrate Leah's birthday together, and Catelynn copes with her fears about adoption. Farrah gets a puppy, while Maci's Ex finally discovers that her boyfriend is living with her.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah takes her daughter Sophia on a trip to visit Sophia's dad's grave, and Amber and her mom get in an argument.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber goes on a date, while Catelynn and Tyler get their parents involved with planning a perfect Christmas. Maci makes a shocking announcement, and Farrah breaks the news to her parents that she wants to move to California.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah and her parents argue while on a trip, and Catelynn reunites with her father. Amber reaches out to Gary to re-unite her family on the anniversary of a tragedy, while Maci considers withdrawing from school.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber spends the night in jail and finds out that a no-contact order has been put on her and Gary. Catelynn and Tyler have a falling out, and Farrah explores moving to Florida. Maci is overwhelmed while taking care of Bentley.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci has a blowout with Ryan over custody, while Amber and Gary struggle with a no-contact order. Catelynn finally finishes high school, and Farrah's parents try to talk her into leaving Sophia behind when she moves away.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber and Gary try to get the no-contact order lifted, while Maci tries to cut Ryan out of her life. Farrah makes an unexpected choice about moving away, and Butch moves in with Catelynn and Tyler.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci decides to enroll Bentley in daycare while Amber prepares to go to rehab. Catelynn and Tyler celebrate Carly's second birthday, and Farrah has a change of heart about leaving daughter Sophia behind when she moves.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler have an emotional visit with their daughter. Amber struggles during her first weeks of rehab. Farrah says farewell to her life in Iowa. A disagreement with Ryan disrupts Maci and Kyle's relationship.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler attend their high school graduation. Maci considers joining Ryan on his family vacation. Farrah has to deal with her parents' overbearing concerns. In rehab, Amber expects a visit from Gary and Leah.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Gary and Leah visit Amber in rehab, and Farrah goes on a date with her neighbor. Maci tags along on Ryan's family vacation and Catelynn and Tyler question letting Butch move back into their home.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber and Gary work on their relationship issues. Maci struggles to choose classes. Visiting her parents, Farrah is annoyed with their concerns for Sophia. Catelynn and her grandmother attend a birth parent support group.
